description_long: This is a tall, modern street lamp with a slender, metallic pole anchored into a square concrete base. The pole features a slight bend at the top, extending outward to support a streamlined, rectangular lamp head, typical of urban street lighting. Midway up the pole, there is a circular, dark-colored element, possibly a mounting bracket or a decorative ring. The lamp head is designed to direct light downward, ideal for illuminating sidewalks, streets, or parking areas. The overall design is utilitarian with minimal decorative features, focusing on durability and function. The materials appear to be primarily metal for the pole and lamp head, with concrete for the base.
description: A tall, modern street lamp with a slender metal pole, concrete base, and a streamlined lamp head extending outward. Features a circular element midway up the pole.
description_view_0: Front view showing the slim pole, square base, and the lamp head barely visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the outward bend of the pole and the full profile of the lamp head, as well as the circular element on the pole.
description_view_2: Rear view with the pole and base visible, and the circular element more prominent at the center.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the lamp head's extension and the circular element, mirroring view 1.
